description: Hand-labeled prompts for psf/requests (Python HTTP client). 12 descriptive prompts — filenames deliberately not mentioned in most. expected_files identified by reading the repo at SHA f43f750e.

prompts.prompt: where is the top-level get/post/put/delete request function that users call
how does it persist cookies and connection pools across calls in one session
transport adapter that handles retries and connection pooling
the PreparedRequest and Response classes and how the request body is prepared
how are cookies stored and converted between jar formats
the hierarchy of exceptions like ConnectionError, Timeout, HTTPError
lookup table mapping HTTP status codes to their names
helpers for encoding URL parameters and handling unicode in headers
case-insensitive dict used to store HTTP headers
